purpose: Example read-only audit record for a Claude Code to Codex import.

remote_boundary.note: The hosted MCP endpoint only returns install, preview, and checklist handoffs. Real migration runs locally.

checks.summary: AGENTS.md exists and documents repository-specific operating rules.
CLAUDE.md content was imported as source context and needs operator review before promotion to global Codex rules.
MCP server definitions were copied without secret values and require point-of-use credential checks.
Claude Code hooks were inventoried; Codex-compatible hooks should be installed only after reviewing command safety.
No API keys, tokens, SSH private keys, or process environment dumps are present in the audit record.

next_actions: Run the local Bring Your AI CLI from the source repository root.
Review imported CLAUDE.md rules before promoting them into AGENTS.md.
Run the Codex import audit workflow before allowing Codex to edit production code.
